description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a symmetrical facade, featuring a dark gray hip roof and a rectangular footprint. The front of the house has two large windows on each floor, all framed with light-colored sills and purple curtains, and a central entry door with a small overhang. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, and the house sits on a neatly trimmed green lawn with a straight stone walkway leading to the front door. The side and rear elevations are plain, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the focus on the front facade. The roof is composed of dark shingles, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods. The house appears to be designed for single-family occupancy, with a compact and efficient layout.
description: A two-story brick house with a dark hip roof, symmetrical front windows, and a central entry door, set on a green lawn with a stone walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing two stories, four large windows with purple curtains, a central entry door, and a stone walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the stone walkway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless brick wall and the hip roof, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain brick wall and the stone walkway extending along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry door with a small overhang, accessed by a straight stone walkway, flanked by large windows and simple trim.
